messages.message: 'authUser' is assigned a value but never used.
The 'expiresAt' conditional could make the dependencies of useEffect Hook (at line 52) change on every render. To fix this, wrap the initialization of 'expiresAt' in its own useMemo() Hook.

The 'startedAt' conditional could make the dependencies of useEffect Hook (at line 52) change on every render. Move it inside the useEffect callback. Alternatively, wrap the initialization of 'startedAt' in its own useMemo() Hook.
